name: Steel Eagle
short_description: Steel Eagle is a reference to the 80's and 90's shooters. Your task is to reach the landing pad at the end of the level, destroying as many enemy units as possible, for which you collect points that can be exchanged for force and strength, which allows you to upgrade your “Steel Eagle”.
detailed_description:
New DLC "Steel Eagle - Cave mission" is available now


In the newest DLC you will find 20 levels in the new scenery of caves with narrow corridors and

chambers. New difficulties have also been added in the form of a collision with slopes and rub on the

rocks. As in the basic version of the game, there are two difficulty modes: EASY and NORM.


Try for free DEMO version of the game


A cut-down version of the full game is now available to download as a Demo. Look for the „Download Demo” button on the Store page.

In the free demo of the game, players can know with the mechanics of the game. Two cut-down levels are available.

In the demo version there isn't available to unlock the limit to 60 FPS.


About the Game



Steel Eagle is a reference to classic arcade top-down view shooters with a scrolled map. Lead the Steel Eagle safely through 20 levels, destroying as many enemies as possible on the way. At the end of each level there is a landing pad waiting for you, which allows you to move to the next level. Of course, the landing pad is guarded by enemies.
Once you reach the landing pad you will be able to exchange the points for additional force and strength of your “Steel Eagle”.



Main features:
- 20 different levels.
- simple vehicle development system, but giving the chance to try different development options.
- the ability to unlock the FPS if the standard speed of the game will be too slow for you (test how many frames will take your computer!).

Sit at the controls of the “Steel Eagle” and get the most points.
